message:
fix(tests): update extension conformance tests for Arc context and struct literal policy

- ext_conformance_diff.rs: Wrap dispatch_event context in Arc::new()
  at both warmup and measurement call sites to match the updated
  runtime API that now takes Arc<ExtensionContext>.
- ext_conformance_scenarios.rs: Use struct literal with
  ..ExtensionPolicy::default() spread instead of constructing default
  then mutating mode field, for clearer intent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
